title: Senior Doctor - Abbott India Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Abbott India Holdings Services - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Abbott India Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Abbott India Holdings Services:
Abbott India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Abbott India Holdings Services!
